hero.tagline: Helping businesses grow through strategic consulting — renewable energy, business development, IT & digital transformation, HR & operations, sales & project management, and financial solutions.

about.title: Professional profile
about.summary: A blend of business development, client relations, and technology expertise for impactful business solutions.
bio: Professional consultant with over 7 years of experience in business development, client relations, renewable energy, and digital transformation. A computer engineering background strengthens an analytical approach to designing measurable business solutions — from market growth strategy to digital system implementation.

Experienced in leading cross-industry projects in telecommunications and energy, coordinating multidisciplinary teams, and developing digital platforms for business process automation. Combines expertise in business development, HR, sales, project management, IT, and finance to deliver integrated consulting that creates real impact for organizations.
about.coreStrengthsDescription: Six key areas of expertise supporting integrated consulting.

services.title: Integrated consulting solutions
services.description: Renewable Energy, Business Development, IT & Digital, HR Consulting, Sales & Project Management, and Financial Solutions — integrated solutions from strategy to execution.
services.descriptionFull: Professional consulting services designed to support your business growth across multiple sectors.
services.seeMoreRich: See full details on the <link>Services</link> page.
services.pageDescription: Integrated solutions to support your business transformation — from strategy to execution.

renewableEnergy.title: Renewable Energy
renewableEnergy.usp: Sustainable and measurable green energy transition strategies.
renewableEnergy.description: Consulting on planning and implementing renewable energy solutions for businesses seeking operational efficiency while committing to environmental sustainability.

businessDevelopment.title: Business Development
businessDevelopment.usp: Opening new market opportunities and strengthening business growth.
businessDevelopment.description: Business expansion strategy guidance, market opportunity identification, and scalable growth model development — from SMEs to enterprise-scale operations.

itDigital.title: IT & Digital
itDigital.usp: Digital transformation that improves operational efficiency.
itDigital.description: Information technology solutions and business process digitalization — from workflow automation and system integration to web platform development and AI implementation advisory.

hrConsulting.title: HR Consulting
hrConsulting.usp: Optimizing human resources and productive industrial relations.
hrConsulting.description: Comprehensive HR consulting — from recruitment and talent acquisition, compensation structure, organizational development, to labor regulation compliance.

salesProjectManagement.title: Sales & Project Management
salesProjectManagement.usp: On-time project execution with sales targets achieved.
salesProjectManagement.description: End-to-end project management focused on achieving sales targets, field team coordination, real-time reporting, and stakeholder management.

financialSolutions.title: Financial Solutions
financialSolutions.usp: Transparent and structured business financial planning.
financialSolutions.description: Financial and accounting consulting to help businesses manage cash flow, budget planning, profitability analysis, and more efficient accounting processes.

contact.title: Let's collaborate
contact.description: Have a project or want to discuss business opportunities? Send a message and I'll respond as soon as possible.
contact.responseNote: I usually respond within 24–48 hours. For urgent inquiries, please mention it in your message.
